name: Hyper-Futa Slavery
description:
In order to repay family debts, you've been sold into slavery by the mob. Immediately, you're assigned to a "special" brothel which caters to a specific clientele. Namely, hyper futanari. Fulfill their requests or risk punishment and defaulting on your family's debts.

Artist: CanvasSolaris
creator: BlackDahlia
